name: color-picker-sliders-rgb
title: Color Picker (RGB Sliders)
author: Vuelor <https://vuelor.dev>
description: RGB color picker built from individual red, green, blue and alpha sliders.
docs: Tailwind v4 (shadcn-vue default): the vuelor-* tokens are installed automatically via the color-picker-theme dependency, but you must ALSO add `@source "../node_modules/@vuelor/picker";` to your global CSS (adjust the relative path to where your CSS entry file lives) so Tailwind scans the picker's classes — without it the canvas and sliders get purged. Tailwind v3: instead add './node_modules/@vuelor/picker/dist/index.js' to your tailwind.config content array. Non-Tailwind projects: set styling="vanillacss" on ColorPickerRoot and import '@vuelor/picker/style.css'.
